properties.title: Short Market Street Lighting
properties.description: Located near the Mission for Inner City's HQ, this installation provides essential ambiance and visibility for this busy culinary corridor.

properties.title: Church Street Lighting
properties.description: Revitalizing a previously dimly lit route to support artisanal market vendors and increase pedestrian footfall.

properties.title: Bree Street Gallery Lighting
properties.description: Accent lighting designed to highlight the gallery façade and secure the public walkway.

properties.title: Long Street Lighting
properties.description: Promoting safety and visibility along the city's busiest nightlife artery.

properties.title: St Georges Mall Lighting
properties.description: Enhancing the pedestrian walkway to support local street vendors and spotlight the Mission's Kiosk of Curiosities.
